from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, types as T, Window

CLICK_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.bf2.hc2b/_data/gen_clickstream_seed42.ndjson"
CUST_PATH  = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.bf2.hc2b/_data/gen_customers_cdc_seed42.ndjson"

SESSION_GAP_SECONDS = 30 * 60

# ---- permissive schemas (superset of plausible field names) ----
CLICK_SCHEMA = T.StructType([T.StructField(n, T.StringType()) for n in [
    "user_id", "userId", "uid", "customer_id", "user",
    "event_type", "event", "stage", "action", "type", "name",
    "timestamp", "ts", "event_time", "time", "event_ts", "created_at",
    "click_id", "id",
]])

CUST_SCHEMA = T.StructType([T.StructField(n, T.StringType()) for n in [
    "user_id", "userId", "customer_id", "id",
    "name", "full_name", "email", "country", "plan", "segment", "tier", "status",
    "version", "seq", "sequence", "ts", "timestamp", "updated_at",
    "op", "operation",
]])


def _jf(prefix, name):
    return F.col(prefix + "." + name)


def _parse_ts(ts_str):
    """Robustly parse ISO strings or epoch (s / ms) into a timestamp."""
    is_digits = ts_str.rlike("^[0-9]+$")
    as_long = ts_str.cast("long")
    epoch_ts = F.when(F.length(ts_str) >= 13, F.timestamp_millis(as_long)) \
                .otherwise(F.timestamp_seconds(as_long))
    return F.when(is_digits, epoch_ts).otherwise(F.to_timestamp(ts_str))


def _norm_stage(c):
    lc = F.lower(F.trim(c))
    return (F.when(lc.contains("purchase") | lc.contains("buy") | lc.rlike("order|payment|transaction"), F.lit("purchase"))
              .when(lc.contains("checkout"), F.lit("checkout"))
              .when(lc.contains("cart"), F.lit("cart"))
              .when(lc.contains("view") | lc.contains("page") | lc.contains("impression") | lc.contains("browse"), F.lit("view"))
              .otherwise(lc))


# ---------------- bronze: parse + classify every source line ----------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="bronze_clicks")
def bronze_clicks():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    raw = spark.read.text(CLICK_PATH).select(F.col("value").alias("raw_line"))
    parsed = raw.withColumn("j", F.from_json(F.col("raw_line"), CLICK_SCHEMA))

    user_id = F.coalesce(_jf("j", "user_id"), _jf("j", "userId"), _jf("j", "uid"),
                         _jf("j", "customer_id"), _jf("j", "user"))
    event_raw = F.coalesce(_jf("j", "event_type"), _jf("j", "event"), _jf("j", "stage"),
                           _jf("j", "action"), _jf("j", "type"), _jf("j", "name"))
    ts_str = F.coalesce(_jf("j", "timestamp"), _jf("j", "ts"), _jf("j", "event_time"),
                        _jf("j", "time"), _jf("j", "event_ts"), _jf("j", "created_at"))
    event_time = _parse_ts(ts_str)

    out = (parsed
           .withColumn("user_id", user_id)
           .withColumn("event_raw", event_raw)
           .withColumn("event_time", event_time)
           .withColumn("stage", _norm_stage(event_raw)))

    reason = (F.when(F.col("j").isNull(), F.lit("unparseable_json"))
                .when(F.col("user_id").isNull(), F.lit("missing_user"))
                .when(F.col("event_time").isNull(), F.lit("missing_or_bad_timestamp"))
                .when(F.col("event_raw").isNull(), F.lit("missing_event"))
                .otherwise(F.lit(None)))

    return (out
            .withColumn("reject_reason", reason)
            .withColumn("is_clean", F.col("reject_reason").isNull())
            .select("raw_line", "user_id", "event_raw", "event_time", "stage",
                    "is_clean", "reject_reason"))


# ---------------- holding area for anything unparseable/incomplete ----------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="quarantine_events")
def quarantine_events():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    return (spark.read.table("bronze_clicks")
            .where(~F.col("is_clean"))
            .select("raw_line", "reject_reason"))


# ---------------- current profile per user from the CDC feed ----------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="customers_current")
def customers_current():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    raw = spark.read.text(CUST_PATH)
    parsed = raw.withColumn("j", F.from_json(F.col("value"), CUST_SCHEMA)).where(F.col("j").isNotNull())

    user_id = F.coalesce(_jf("j", "user_id"), _jf("j", "userId"),
                         _jf("j", "customer_id"), _jf("j", "id"))
    ord_num = F.coalesce(_jf("j", "version").cast("double"),
                         _jf("j", "seq").cast("double"),
                         _jf("j", "sequence").cast("double"))
    ord_ts = F.coalesce(_parse_ts(_jf("j", "updated_at")),
                        _parse_ts(_jf("j", "ts")),
                        _parse_ts(_jf("j", "timestamp")))
    op_norm = F.lower(F.trim(F.coalesce(_jf("j", "op"), _jf("j", "operation"), F.lit(""))))

    enriched = (parsed
                .withColumn("user_id", user_id)
                .withColumn("ord_num", ord_num)
                .withColumn("ord_ts", ord_ts)
                .withColumn("op_norm", op_norm)
                .withColumn("cust_name", F.coalesce(_jf("j", "name"), _jf("j", "full_name")))
                .withColumn("cust_email", _jf("j", "email"))
                .withColumn("cust_country", _jf("j", "country"))
                .withColumn("cust_plan", _jf("j", "plan"))
                .withColumn("cust_segment", _jf("j", "segment"))
                .withColumn("cust_tier", _jf("j", "tier"))
                .withColumn("cust_status", _jf("j", "status"))
                .where(F.col("user_id").isNotNull()))

    w = Window.partitionBy("user_id").orderBy(
        F.col("ord_num").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("ord_ts").desc_nulls_last())

    latest = (enriched
              .withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
              .where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
              # drop users whose most recent CDC record is a delete
              .where(~F.col("op_norm").isin("d", "delete", "del")))

    return latest.select("user_id", "cust_name", "cust_email", "cust_country",
                         "cust_plan", "cust_segment", "cust_tier", "cust_status")


# ---------------- silver: clean events sessionized + enriched ----------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="silver_sessions")
def silver_sessions():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    clean = spark.read.table("bronze_clicks").where(F.col("is_clean"))

    # deterministic ordering (ts, then stable tiebreak on raw line)
    w_ord = Window.partitionBy("user_id").orderBy(
        F.col("event_time").cast("long"), F.col("raw_line"))
    prev_ts = F.lag(F.col("event_time").cast("long")).over(w_ord)
    gap = F.col("event_time").cast("long") - prev_ts
    new_sess = F.when(prev_ts.isNull() | (gap > SESSION_GAP_SECONDS), 1).otherwise(0)

    w_run = w_ord.rowsBetween(Window.unboundedPreceding, Window.currentRow)

    sessioned = (clean
                 .withColumn("_new_sess", new_sess)
                 .withColumn("session_num", F.sum("_new_sess").over(w_run))
                 .withColumn("visit_id", F.concat_ws("_", F.col("user_id"),
                                                     F.col("session_num").cast("string"))))

    prof = spark.read.table("customers_current")

    enriched = sessioned.join(F.broadcast(prof), on="user_id", how="left")

    return enriched.select(
        "user_id", "visit_id", "session_num",
        F.col("event_time"),
        F.col("event_raw").alias("event"),
        F.col("stage"),
        "cust_name", "cust_email", "cust_country",
        "cust_plan", "cust_segment", "cust_tier", "cust_status",
        F.col("raw_line"),
    )


# ---------------- gold: distinct users per funnel stage ----------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="gold_funnel")
def gold_funnel():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    s = spark.read.table("silver_sessions")
    return (s.where(F.col("stage").isin("view", "cart", "checkout", "purchase"))
             .groupBy("stage")
             .agg(F.countDistinct("user_id").alias("users"))
             .select("stage", "users"))

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F
from pyspark.sql.window import Window
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType

CLICK_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.bf2.hc2b/_data/gen_clickstream_seed3141.ndjson"
CDC_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.bf2.hc2b/_data/gen_customers_cdc_seed3141.ndjson"

# Broad candidate schemas so unknown/messy field names never error; missing keys -> null.
CLICK_SCHEMA = StructType([StructField(n, StringType()) for n in [
    "user_id", "userId", "uid", "customer_id",
    "event", "event_type", "type", "action", "stage",
    "ts", "timestamp", "event_time", "time", "event_ts",
    "event_id", "id",
]])

CDC_SCHEMA = StructType([StructField(n, StringType()) for n in [
    "customer_id", "user_id", "id", "uid", "customerId",
    "updated_at", "_commit_timestamp", "commit_ts", "ts", "timestamp",
    "event_time", "version", "seq",
    "name", "full_name", "customer_name", "email",
    "country", "country_code", "segment", "plan", "tier",
    "op", "operation",
]])


def parse_ts(c):
    """Robustly parse a timestamp from either epoch (s/ms) or common string forms."""
    num = c.cast("double")
    is_num = c.rlike(r'^\s*[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?\s*$')
    epoch = F.when(num > F.lit(1e12), F.timestamp_millis(num.cast("long"))) \
             .otherwise(F.timestamp_seconds(num.cast("long")))
    return F.coalesce(
        F.when(is_num, epoch),
        F.to_timestamp(c),
        F.to_timestamp(c, "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss[.SSS][XXX]"),
        F.to_timestamp(c, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"),
    )


# ---------- Bronze: raw lines (nothing dropped, corrupt-safe) ----------
@dp.materialized_view(name="bronze_clicks_raw")
def bronze_clicks_raw():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    return (spark.read.text(CLICK_PATH)
            .withColumnRenamed("value", "raw")
            .withColumn("row_id", F.monotonically_increasing_id()))


# ---------- Parse + classify each source line ----------
@dp.materialized_view(name="clicks_parsed")
def clicks_parsed():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = spark.read.table("bronze_clicks_raw").withColumn("j", F.from_json("raw", CLICK_SCHEMA))

    uid = F.coalesce(F.col("j.user_id"), F.col("j.userId"), F.col("j.uid"), F.col("j.customer_id"))
    etype = F.lower(F.trim(F.coalesce(
        F.col("j.event_type"), F.col("j.event"), F.col("j.type"),
        F.col("j.action"), F.col("j.stage"))))
    ts_raw = F.coalesce(F.col("j.ts"), F.col("j.timestamp"), F.col("j.event_time"),
                        F.col("j.time"), F.col("j.event_ts"))
    event_time = parse_ts(ts_raw)

    stage = (F.when(etype.contains("purchase") | etype.contains("buy"), F.lit("purchase"))
              .when(etype.contains("checkout"), F.lit("checkout"))
              .when(etype.contains("cart"), F.lit("cart"))
              .when(etype.contains("view"), F.lit("view"))
              .otherwise(F.lit(None)))

    event_id = F.coalesce(F.col("j.event_id"), F.col("j.id"), F.col("row_id").cast("string"))
    is_clean = uid.isNotNull() & event_time.isNotNull()
    reason = (F.when(F.col("j").isNull(), F.lit("unparseable_json"))
               .when(uid.isNull(), F.lit("missing_user_id"))
               .when(event_time.isNull(), F.lit("unparseable_timestamp"))
               .otherwise(F.lit(None)))

    return df.select(
        event_id.alias("event_id"),
        uid.alias("user_id"),
        event_time.alias("event_time"),
        stage.alias("stage"),
        F.col("raw"),
        is_clean.alias("is_clean"),
        reason.alias("reason"),
    )


# ---------- Holding area for anything unparseable / unusable ----------
@dp.materialized_view(name="held_events")
def held_events():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    return (spark.read.table("clicks_parsed")
            .where(~F.col("is_clean"))
            .select("raw", "reason"))


# ---------- Current profile per customer (CDC deduped -> 1 row/customer, no fan-out) ----------
@dp.materialized_view(name="customers_current")
def customers_current():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = (spark.read.text(CDC_PATH)
          .withColumnRenamed("value", "raw")
          .withColumn("cdc_id", F.monotonically_increasing_id())
          .withColumn("j", F.from_json("raw", CDC_SCHEMA)))

    cust_id = F.coalesce(F.col("j.customer_id"), F.col("j.user_id"), F.col("j.id"),
                         F.col("j.uid"), F.col("j.customerId"))
    ord_raw = F.coalesce(F.col("j.updated_at"), F.col("j._commit_timestamp"), F.col("j.commit_ts"),
                         F.col("j.ts"), F.col("j.timestamp"), F.col("j.event_time"),
                         F.col("j.version"), F.col("j.seq"))
    ord_ts = parse_ts(ord_raw)

    df = df.where(cust_id.isNotNull()).select(
        cust_id.alias("cust_id"),
        ord_ts.alias("ord_ts"),
        F.col("cdc_id"),
        F.coalesce(F.col("j.name"), F.col("j.full_name"), F.col("j.customer_name")).alias("profile_name"),
        F.col("j.email").alias("profile_email"),
        F.coalesce(F.col("j.country"), F.col("j.country_code")).alias("profile_country"),
        F.coalesce(F.col("j.segment"), F.col("j.plan"), F.col("j.tier")).alias("profile_segment"),
    )

    w = Window.partitionBy("cust_id").orderBy(
        F.col("ord_ts").desc_nulls_last(), F.col("cdc_id").desc())
    return (df.withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w))
              .where(F.col("rn") == 1)
              .select("cust_id", "profile_name", "profile_email",
                      "profile_country", "profile_segment"))


# ---------- Silver: clean events assigned to visits (30-min inactivity gap) + enriched ----------
@dp.materialized_view(name="silver_sessions")
def silver_sessions():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    ev = (spark.read.table("clicks_parsed")
          .where(F.col("is_clean"))
          .select("event_id", "user_id", "event_time", "stage"))

    w = Window.partitionBy("user_id").orderBy(F.col("event_time").asc())
    prev = F.lag("event_time").over(w)
    gap = F.unix_timestamp("event_time") - F.unix_timestamp(prev)
    new_session = F.when(prev.isNull() | (gap > F.lit(1800)), F.lit(1)).otherwise(F.lit(0))

    wcum = w.rowsBetween(Window.unboundedPreceding, Window.currentRow)
    ev = (ev.withColumn("new_session", new_session)
            .withColumn("visit_num", F.sum("new_session").over(wcum))
            .withColumn("visit_id",
                        F.concat_ws("_", F.col("user_id"), F.col("visit_num").cast("string"))))

    cust = spark.read.table("customers_current")
    return (ev.join(cust, ev["user_id"] == cust["cust_id"], "left")
            .select(
                ev["event_id"],
                ev["user_id"],
                ev["event_time"],
                ev["stage"],
                ev["visit_id"],
                cust["profile_name"],
                cust["profile_email"],
                cust["profile_country"],
                cust["profile_segment"],
            ))


# ---------- Gold: distinct users per funnel stage ----------
@dp.materialized_view(name="gold_funnel")
def gold_funnel():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    return (spark.read.table("silver_sessions")
            .where(F.col("stage").isin("view", "cart", "checkout", "purchase"))
            .groupBy("stage")
            .agg(F.countDistinct("user_id").alias("users"))
            .select("stage", "users"))


# ---------- Reconciliation: clean + held == source ----------
@dp.materialized_view(name="reconciliation")
def reconciliation():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    src = spark.read.table("bronze_clicks_raw").agg(F.count(F.lit(1)).alias("value")) \
        .withColumn("metric", F.lit("source_count"))
    clean = spark.read.table("silver_sessions").agg(F.count(F.lit(1)).alias("value")) \
        .withColumn("metric", F.lit("clean_count"))
    held = spark.read.table("held_events").agg(F.count(F.lit(1)).alias("value")) \
        .withColumn("metric", F.lit("held_count"))
    return src.select("metric", "value").unionByName(
        clean.select("metric", "value")).unionByName(
        held.select("metric", "value"))

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window
from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType

CLICK_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.bf2.hc2b/_data/gen_clickstream_seed5772.ndjson"
CDC_PATH   = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.bf2.hc2b/_data/gen_customers_cdc_seed5772.ndjson"

DB = "spark_catalog.default."
FUNNEL_STAGES = ["view", "cart", "checkout", "purchase"]
GAP_SECONDS = 30 * 60

# --- permissive superset schemas (unknown extra keys are ignored) ----------
_click_keys = ["user_id", "userId", "uid", "user", "customer_id",
               "event_type", "event", "stage", "type", "action", "name",
               "ts", "timestamp", "event_time", "event_ts", "time", "created_at",
               "click_id", "event_id", "id"]
CLICK_SCHEMA = StructType([StructField(k, StringType(), True) for k in _click_keys])

_cdc_keys = ["user_id", "userId", "uid", "user", "customer_id",
             "updated_at", "ts", "timestamp", "effective_ts", "event_time",
             "valid_from", "eff_ts", "created_at", "op", "operation",
             "country", "country_code", "geo",
             "plan", "plan_type", "subscription",
             "tier", "segment", "user_segment",
             "email", "email_address", "name", "full_name", "customer_name", "city"]
CDC_SCHEMA = StructType([StructField(k, StringType(), True) for k in _cdc_keys])


def _first(j, names):
    return F.coalesce(*[j[n] for n in names])


def _parse_ts(c):
    s = F.trim(c)
    num = s.cast("double")
    return F.coalesce(
        F.try_to_timestamp(s),
        F.try_to_timestamp(s, F.lit("yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss[.SSS][XXX]")),
        F.try_to_timestamp(s, F.lit("yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'Z'")),
        F.when(num > F.lit(1e12), (num / F.lit(1000.0)).cast("timestamp"))
         .when(num > F.lit(0), num.cast("timestamp")),
    )


# --------------------------------------------------------------------------
# BRONZE: raw clickstream, one row per source line, parsed + classified
# --------------------------------------------------------------------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="bronze_clicks")
def bronze_clicks():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    raw = (spark.read.text(CLICK_PATH)
           .withColumn("line_id", F.monotonically_increasing_id()))
    j = F.from_json(F.col("value"), CLICK_SCHEMA)
    df = raw.withColumn("j", j)
    user_id = _first(F.col("j"), ["user_id", "userId", "uid", "user", "customer_id"])
    raw_stage = _first(F.col("j"), ["event_type", "event", "stage", "type", "action", "name"])
    raw_ts = _first(F.col("j"), ["ts", "timestamp", "event_time", "event_ts", "time", "created_at"])
    event_ts = _parse_ts(raw_ts)
    stage = F.lower(F.trim(raw_stage))
    is_clean = user_id.isNotNull() & event_ts.isNotNull()
    reason = (F.when(F.col("j").isNull(), F.lit("unparseable_json"))
              .when(user_id.isNull(), F.lit("missing_user_id"))
              .when(event_ts.isNull(), F.lit("missing_or_bad_timestamp"))
              .otherwise(F.lit("ok")))
    return df.select(
        F.col("line_id").alias("event_id"),
        F.col("value").alias("raw_line"),
        user_id.cast("string").alias("user_id"),
        stage.alias("stage"),
        event_ts.alias("event_ts"),
        is_clean.alias("is_clean"),
        reason.alias("reason"),
    )


# --------------------------------------------------------------------------
# HOLDING AREA: anything not parseable / missing required fields
# --------------------------------------------------------------------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="holding_events")
def holding_events():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    return (spark.read.table(DB + "bronze_clicks")
            .where(~F.col("is_clean"))
            .select("event_id", "raw_line", "reason"))


# --------------------------------------------------------------------------
# BRONZE CDC: current-profile change feed, parsed
# --------------------------------------------------------------------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="bronze_cdc")
def bronze_cdc():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    raw = spark.read.text(CDC_PATH)
    j = F.from_json(F.col("value"), CDC_SCHEMA)
    df = raw.withColumn("j", j)
    user_id = _first(F.col("j"), ["user_id", "userId", "uid", "user", "customer_id"])
    eff_ts = _parse_ts(_first(F.col("j"),
                              ["updated_at", "eff_ts", "effective_ts", "valid_from",
                               "ts", "timestamp", "event_time", "created_at"]))
    return (df.select(
                user_id.cast("string").alias("cdc_user_id"),
                eff_ts.alias("eff_ts"),
                _first(F.col("j"), ["country", "country_code", "geo"]).alias("country"),
                _first(F.col("j"), ["plan", "plan_type", "subscription"]).alias("plan"),
                _first(F.col("j"), ["tier"]).alias("tier"),
                _first(F.col("j"), ["segment", "user_segment"]).alias("segment"),
                _first(F.col("j"), ["email", "email_address"]).alias("email"),
                _first(F.col("j"), ["name", "full_name", "customer_name"]).alias("name"),
                _first(F.col("j"), ["city"]).alias("city"),
            )
            .where(F.col("cdc_user_id").isNotNull() & F.col("eff_ts").isNotNull()))


# --------------------------------------------------------------------------
# SILVER: clean events -> visits (30-min inactivity) + as-of profile enrichment
# --------------------------------------------------------------------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="silver_sessions")
def silver_sessions():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    clean = (spark.read.table(DB + "bronze_clicks")
             .where(F.col("is_clean"))
             .select("event_id", "user_id", "stage", "event_ts"))

    # sessionize: new visit begins after 30 min of inactivity
    w_user = Window.partitionBy("user_id").orderBy("event_ts")
    prev_ts = F.lag("event_ts").over(w_user)
    gap = F.unix_timestamp("event_ts") - F.unix_timestamp(prev_ts)
    new_visit = F.when(prev_ts.isNull() | (gap > F.lit(GAP_SECONDS)), 1).otherwise(0)
    w_run = w_user.rowsBetween(Window.unboundedPreceding, Window.currentRow)
    sessed = (clean
              .withColumn("visit_num", F.sum(new_visit).over(w_run))
              .withColumn("visit_id", F.concat_ws("#", F.col("user_id"),
                                                  F.col("visit_num").cast("string"))))

    # as-of join: latest profile with eff_ts <= event_ts (else null profile)
    cdc = spark.read.table(DB + "bronze_cdc")
    e = sessed.alias("e")
    c = cdc.alias("c")
    cond = (F.col("e.user_id") == F.col("c.cdc_user_id")) & (F.col("c.eff_ts") <= F.col("e.event_ts"))
    joined = e.join(c, cond, "left")
    w_asof = Window.partitionBy("e.event_id").orderBy(F.col("c.eff_ts").desc_nulls_last())
    ranked = joined.withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w_asof)).where(F.col("rn") == 1)

    return ranked.select(
        F.col("e.event_id").alias("event_id"),
        F.col("e.user_id").alias("user_id"),
        F.col("e.stage").alias("stage"),
        F.col("e.event_ts").alias("event_ts"),
        F.col("e.visit_id").alias("visit_id"),
        F.col("c.eff_ts").alias("profile_eff_ts"),
        F.col("c.country").alias("country"),
        F.col("c.plan").alias("plan"),
        F.col("c.tier").alias("tier"),
        F.col("c.segment").alias("segment"),
        F.col("c.email").alias("email"),
        F.col("c.name").alias("name"),
        F.col("c.city").alias("city"),
    )


# --------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Reference stage list so every funnel stage is present (even at 0 users)
# --------------------------------------------------------------------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="stages_ref")
def stages_ref():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    return (spark.range(len(FUNNEL_STAGES))
            .select(
                F.when(F.col("id") == 0, F.lit("view"))
                 .when(F.col("id") == 1, F.lit("cart"))
                 .when(F.col("id") == 2, F.lit("checkout"))
                 .otherwise(F.lit("purchase")).alias("stage"),
                F.col("id").alias("stage_order")))


# --------------------------------------------------------------------------
# GOLD FUNNEL: distinct users who reached each stage
# --------------------------------------------------------------------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="gold_funnel")
def gold_funnel():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    counts = (spark.read.table(DB + "silver_sessions")
              .where(F.col("stage").isin(FUNNEL_STAGES))
              .groupBy("stage")
              .agg(F.countDistinct("user_id").alias("users")))
    ref = spark.read.table(DB + "stages_ref")
    return (ref.join(counts, "stage", "left")
            .select("stage", F.coalesce(F.col("users"), F.lit(0)).cast("long").alias("users"))
            .orderBy("stage"))


# --------------------------------------------------------------------------
# RECONCILIATION: clean + held == source line count
# --------------------------------------------------------------------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="gold_reconciliation")
def gold_reconciliation():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    b = spark.read.table(DB + "bronze_clicks")
    return b.groupBy().agg(

        F.sum(F.col("is_clean").cast("int")).alias("clean_count"),
        F.sum((~F.col("is_clean")).cast("int")).alias("held_count"),
    ).withColumn("reconciles", (F.col("clean_count") + F.col("held_count")) == F.col("source_count"))

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window
from pyspark.sql.types import MapType, StringType

CLICK_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.bf2.hc2b/_data/gen_clickstream_seed8675.ndjson"
CUST_PATH  = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.bf2.hc2b/_data/gen_customers_cdc_seed8675.ndjson"

MAP = MapType(StringType(), StringType())


def _parse_ts(ts_raw):
    """Parse ISO strings, epoch-seconds, or epoch-millis into a timestamp."""
    iso = F.to_timestamp(ts_raw)
    num = ts_raw.cast("double")
    epoch = (
        F.when(num >= F.lit(1e12), F.timestamp_millis(num.cast("long")))
         .when(num >= F.lit(1e9),  F.timestamp_seconds(num.cast("long")))
         .otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("timestamp"))
    )
    return F.coalesce(iso, epoch)


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Clickstream: parse every source line; keep 1 row per line for reconciliation.
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="parsed_clicks")
def parsed_clicks():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    raw = spark.read.text(CLICK_PATH).select(F.col("value").alias("_raw"))
    m = F.from_json(F.col("_raw"), MAP)

    uid = F.coalesce(m["user_id"], m["userId"], m["uid"], m["user"],
                     m["customer_id"], m["customerId"], m["cust_id"])
    et = F.lower(F.coalesce(m["event_type"], m["event"], m["type"],
                            m["action"], m["stage"], m["name"]))
    ts_raw = F.coalesce(m["ts"], m["timestamp"], m["event_time"], m["event_ts"],
                        m["time"], m["created_at"], m["@timestamp"], m["occurred_at"])
    eid = F.coalesce(m["event_id"], m["id"], m["eventId"], m["click_id"])

    event_ts = _parse_ts(ts_raw)
    stage = (F.when(et.contains("purchase"), F.lit("purchase"))
              .when(et.contains("checkout"), F.lit("checkout"))
              .when(et.contains("cart"),     F.lit("cart"))
              .when(et.contains("view"),     F.lit("view"))
              .otherwise(et))

    ok = m.isNotNull() & uid.isNotNull() & event_ts.isNotNull() & et.isNotNull()

    return raw.select(
        F.col("_raw"),
        uid.alias("user_id"),
        et.alias("event_type"),
        stage.alias("stage"),
        event_ts.alias("event_ts"),
        eid.alias("event_id"),
        ok.alias("_ok"),
    )


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Holding area: unparseable / incomplete lines.
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="silver_quarantine")
def silver_quarantine():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = spark.read.table("parsed_clicks")
    return df.where(~F.col("_ok")).select(
        F.col("_raw"),
        F.lit("unparseable_or_missing_required_fields").alias("reason"),
    )


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Current profile from CDC (latest record per user; drop tombstoned users).
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="customers_current")
def customers_current():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    m = F.from_json(F.col("value"), MAP)
    raw = spark.read.text(CUST_PATH).select(m.alias("m")).where(F.col("m").isNotNull())
    mc = F.col("m")

    uid = F.coalesce(mc["user_id"], mc["userId"], mc["uid"], mc["customer_id"],
                     mc["customerId"], mc["id"])
    cts_raw = F.coalesce(mc["updated_at"], mc["ts"], mc["timestamp"], mc["effective_ts"],
                         mc["commit_ts"], mc["__ts_ms"], mc["_ts"], mc["change_ts"])
    op = F.lower(F.coalesce(mc["op"], mc["_op"], mc["__op"], mc["operation"], F.lit("u")))

    c = raw.select(
        uid.alias("user_id"),
        _parse_ts(cts_raw).alias("_cdc_ts"),
        op.alias("_op"),
        mc["country"].alias("country"),
        mc["plan"].alias("plan"),
        mc["tier"].alias("tier"),
        mc["segment"].alias("segment"),
        mc["email"].alias("email"),
        mc["name"].alias("cust_name"),
        mc["city"].alias("city"),
    ).where(F.col("user_id").isNotNull())

    w = Window.partitionBy("user_id").orderBy(
        F.col("_cdc_ts").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("_op").desc_nulls_last(),
    )
    latest = c.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w)).where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
    return (latest
            .where(~F.col("_op").isin("d", "delete"))
            .drop("_rn", "_op", "_cdc_ts"))


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Sessionize (30-min inactivity) over full per-user history + enrich profile.
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="silver_sessions")
def silver_sessions():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    ev = spark.read.table("parsed_clicks").where(F.col("_ok"))

    tiebreak = F.coalesce(F.col("event_id"), F.col("_raw"))
    w = Window.partitionBy("user_id").orderBy(F.col("event_ts").asc(), tiebreak.asc())
    prev = F.lag("event_ts").over(w)
    gap_sec = F.col("event_ts").cast("long") - prev.cast("long")
    new_visit = F.when(prev.isNull() | (gap_sec > F.lit(1800)), 1).otherwise(0)
    visit_num = F.sum(new_visit).over(w.rowsBetween(Window.unboundedPreceding, 0))

    sess = (ev
            .withColumn("visit_num", visit_num)
            .withColumn("visit_id",
                        F.concat_ws("#", F.col("user_id"), F.col("visit_num").cast("string"))))

    prof = spark.read.table("customers_current")
    return (sess.join(prof, on="user_id", how="left")
            .select(
                "event_id", "user_id", "event_ts", "event_type", "stage",
                "visit_num", "visit_id",
                "country", "plan", "tier", "segment", "email", "cust_name", "city",
            ))


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Funnel: distinct users per stage, all four stages guaranteed present.
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="gold_funnel")
def gold_funnel():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    sess = spark.read.table("silver_sessions")

    stages_arr = F.array(F.lit("view"), F.lit("cart"), F.lit("checkout"), F.lit("purchase"))
    base = spark.range(4).select(
        F.element_at(stages_arr, (F.col("id") + 1).cast("int")).alias("stage")
    )

    counts = (sess.where(F.col("stage").isin("view", "cart", "checkout", "purchase"))
              .groupBy("stage")
              .agg(F.countDistinct("user_id").alias("users")))

    return (base.join(counts, on="stage", how="left")
            .select("stage", F.coalesce(F.col("users"), F.lit(0)).cast("long").alias("users")))


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Reconciliation: source == clean + held.
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
@dp.materialized_view(name="gold_reconciliation")
def gold_reconciliation():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    src = spark.read.text(CLICK_PATH).agg(F.count(F.lit(1)).alias("source_count"))
    clean = spark.read.table("silver_sessions").agg(F.count(F.lit(1)).alias("clean_count"))
    held = spark.read.table("silver_quarantine").agg(F.count(F.lit(1)).alias("held_count"))
    return (src.crossJoin(clean).crossJoin(held)
            .withColumn("reconciles",
                        F.col("source_count") == (F.col("clean_count") + F.col("held_count"))))

NUM_RE = r"^[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?$"


def _epoch(col):
    numeric = F.col(col).cast("double")
    as_num = F.when(numeric > F.lit(1e12), numeric / 1000.0).otherwise(numeric)
    return F.when(F.col(col).rlike(NUM_RE), as_num) \
            .otherwise(F.unix_timestamp(F.to_timestamp(F.col(col))).cast("double"))


# ---------- BRONZE: raw parse, keep every line ----------
@dp.materialized_view(name="clicks_bronze")

        .withColumn("user_id", F.coalesce("user_id", "userId", "uid", "customer_id"))

        .withColumn("ts_str", F.coalesce("ts", "timestamp", "event_time", "time", "event_ts")))
    parsed = parsed.withColumn(
        "ts_epoch",
        F.when(F.col("ts_str").isNotNull(), _epoch("ts_str")))

        F.to_timestamp("timestamp"), F.to_timestamp("op_ts"), F.to_timestamp("cdc_ts"))
    ord_num = F.coalesce(F.col("version").cast("double"),
                         F.col("sequence").cast("double"),

    c = c.where(F.col("user_id").isNotNull())

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window
from pyspark.sql.types import MapType, StringType

CLICK_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.bf2.hc2b/_data/gen_clickstream_seed11235.ndjson"
CDC_PATH   = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.bf2.hc2b/_data/gen_customers_cdc_seed11235.ndjson"

MAP_T = MapType(StringType(), StringType())


# ---------- helpers (module-level, plan-building only) ----------
def _get(keys):
    """Coalesce a value across candidate key spellings from the parsed 'm' map."""
    return F.coalesce(*[F.col("m").getItem(k) for k in keys])


def _parse_ts(col):
    """Parse a timestamp from ISO strings, epoch seconds, or epoch millis."""
    s = F.trim(col)
    as_long = s.cast("long")
    # >1e11 ==> millis, else seconds
    epoch_sec = F.when(as_long > F.lit(100000000000), (as_long / F.lit(1000)).cast("long")).otherwise(as_long)
    return F.coalesce(
        F.to_timestamp(s),
        F.when(s.rlike("^[0-9]+$"), F.to_timestamp(F.from_unixtime(epoch_sec))),
    )


def _stage(rawtype):
    t = F.lower(F.trim(rawtype))
    return (
        F.when(t.rlike("purchase|bought|buy|order|complete"), F.lit("purchase"))
         .when(t.rlike("checkout"), F.lit("checkout"))
         .when(t.rlike("cart"), F.lit("cart"))
         .when(t.rlike("view|impression|page"), F.lit("view"))
         .otherwise(t)
    )


USER_KEYS = ["user_id", "userId", "uid", "user", "customer_id", "customerId", "cust_id"]
TS_KEYS   = ["timestamp", "ts", "event_time", "event_ts", "time", "event_timestamp", "_ts", "occurred_at"]
TYPE_KEYS = ["event_type", "event", "type", "stage", "action", "name"]

CDC_USER_KEYS = ["user_id", "userId", "uid", "customer_id", "customerId", "id", "cust_id"]
CDC_TS_KEYS   = ["updated_at", "effective_ts", "valid_from", "event_time", "ts", "timestamp",
                 "commit_ts", "change_ts", "_ts", "modified_at"]
CDC_OP_KEYS   = ["op", "operation", "_op", "change_type", "action", "cdc_op"]


# ---------- clickstream ingestion (line-accountable) ----------
@dp.materialized_view(name="bronze_clicks_raw")
def bronze_clicks_raw():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = spark.read.text(CLICK_PATH)
    return df.select(
        F.monotonically_increasing_id().alias("_line_id"),
        F.col("value").alias("_raw"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="bronze_clicks_parsed")
def bronze_clicks_parsed():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    raw = spark.read.table("bronze_clicks_raw")
    df = raw.withColumn("m", F.from_json(F.col("_raw"), MAP_T))
    uid = _get(USER_KEYS)
    ts = _parse_ts(_get(TS_KEYS))
    stg = _stage(_get(TYPE_KEYS))
    return df.select(
        F.col("_line_id"),
        F.col("_raw"),
        F.col("m").isNotNull().alias("_json_ok"),
        F.when(F.length(F.trim(uid)) > 0, F.trim(uid)).alias("user_id"),
        ts.alias("event_time"),
        stg.alias("stage"),
    )


# A row is a placeable click iff JSON parsed AND has a user AND a valid timestamp.
def _is_clean():
    return F.col("_json_ok") & F.col("user_id").isNotNull() & F.col("event_time").isNotNull()


@dp.materialized_view(name="clean_events")
def clean_events():
    p = SparkSession.active().read.table("bronze_clicks_parsed")
    return p.where(_is_clean()).select("_line_id", "user_id", "event_time", "stage")


@dp.materialized_view(name="held_events")
def held_events():
    p = SparkSession.active().read.table("bronze_clicks_parsed")
    reason = (
        F.when(~F.col("_json_ok"), F.lit("unparseable_json"))
         .when(F.col("user_id").isNull(), F.lit("missing_user_id"))
         .when(F.col("event_time").isNull(), F.lit("missing_or_invalid_timestamp"))
         .otherwise(F.lit("unknown"))
    )
    return p.where(~_is_clean()).select(
        F.col("_line_id"),
        F.col("_raw").alias("raw_record"),
        reason.alias("hold_reason"),
    )


# ---------- customer profile (current = latest CDC record per user) ----------
@dp.materialized_view(name="dim_customer_current")
def dim_customer_current():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    raw = spark.read.text(CDC_PATH)
    df = raw.withColumn("m", F.from_json(F.col("value"), MAP_T)).where(F.col("m").isNotNull())
    uid = _get(CDC_USER_KEYS)
    ts = _parse_ts(_get(CDC_TS_KEYS))
    op = F.lower(F.trim(_get(CDC_OP_KEYS)))
    proj = df.select(
        F.when(F.length(F.trim(uid)) > 0, F.trim(uid)).alias("user_id"),
        ts.alias("_eff_ts"),
        op.alias("_op"),
        F.to_json(F.col("m")).alias("profile_json"),
        _get(["name", "full_name", "customer_name", "first_name"]).alias("name"),
        _get(["email", "email_address"]).alias("email"),
        _get(["country", "country_code", "region", "geo"]).alias("country"),
        _get(["tier", "plan", "segment", "membership", "level"]).alias("tier"),
    ).where(F.col("user_id").isNotNull())

    w = Window.partitionBy("user_id").orderBy(F.col("_eff_ts").desc_nulls_last())
    latest = proj.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w)).where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
    deleted = F.col("_op").rlike("delete|remove|^d$")
    return latest.select(
        "user_id",
        F.when(deleted, F.lit(None)).otherwise(F.col("profile_json")).alias("profile_json"),
        F.when(deleted, F.lit(None)).otherwise(F.col("name")).alias("profile_name"),
        F.when(deleted, F.lit(None)).otherwise(F.col("email")).alias("profile_email"),
        F.when(deleted, F.lit(None)).otherwise(F.col("country")).alias("profile_country"),
        F.when(deleted, F.lit(None)).otherwise(F.col("tier")).alias("profile_tier"),
    )


# ---------- sessionization (batch: late/out-of-order events sorted in) ----------
@dp.materialized_view(name="silver_sessions")
def silver_sessions():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    ce = spark.read.table("clean_events")
    dim = spark.read.table("dim_customer_current")

    w = Window.partitionBy("user_id").orderBy(F.col("event_time").asc(), F.col("_line_id").asc())
    wc = w.rowsBetween(Window.unboundedPreceding, Window.currentRow)

    prev = F.lag("event_time").over(w)
    gap = F.col("event_time").cast("long") - prev.cast("long")
    new_visit = F.when(prev.isNull() | (gap > F.lit(1800)), F.lit(1)).otherwise(F.lit(0))

    sess = (
        ce.withColumn("_new", new_visit)
          .withColumn("visit_seq", F.sum("_new").over(wc))
          .withColumn("visit_id", F.concat_ws("_", F.col("user_id"), F.lit("v"), F.col("visit_seq")))
    )

    out = sess.join(dim, on="user_id", how="left")
    return out.select(
        "user_id",
        "event_time",
        "stage",
        "visit_id",
        "visit_seq",
        "profile_json",
        "profile_name",
        "profile_email",
        "profile_country",
        "profile_tier",
        F.col("_line_id"),
    )


# ---------- funnel: distinct users per stage ----------
@dp.materialized_view(name="gold_funnel")
def gold_funnel():
    s = SparkSession.active().read.table("silver_sessions")
    return (
        s.where(F.col("stage").isin("view", "cart", "checkout", "purchase"))
         .groupBy("stage")
         .agg(F.countDistinct("user_id").alias("users"))
    )


# ---------- reconciliation: clean + held == source ----------
@dp.materialized_view(name="recon_counts")
def recon_counts():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    src = spark.read.table("bronze_clicks_raw").agg(F.count(F.lit(1)).alias("source_count"))
    cl = spark.read.table("clean_events").agg(F.count(F.lit(1)).alias("clean_count"))
    hd = spark.read.table("held_events").agg(F.count(F.lit(1)).alias("held_count"))
    out = src.crossJoin(cl).crossJoin(hd)
    return out.withColumn(
        "reconciled",
        (F.col("clean_count") + F.col("held_count")) == F.col("source_count"),
    )

# ---- explicit schemas (no inference -> no analysis job in query functions) ----
CLICK_SCHEMA = T.StructType([
    T.StructField("user_id",    T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("userId",     T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("uid",        T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("event_id",   T.StringType()),

    T.StructField("event_type", T.StringType()),

    T.StructField("timestamp",  T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("event_time", T.StringType()),

])

CDC_SCHEMA = T.StructType([
    T.StructField("customer_id", T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("user_id",     T.StringType()),

    T.StructField("id",          T.StringType()),

    T.StructField("op_ts",       T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("_ts",         T.StringType()),
    T.StructField("version",     T.StringType()),
])

def _ts(colnames):
    # parse a timestamp string as ISO or epoch-seconds, first non-null wins
    exprs = []
    for c in colnames:
        exprs.append(F.to_timestamp(F.col(c)))
        exprs.append(F.timestamp_seconds(F.col(c).cast("long")))
    return F.coalesce(*exprs)


# ================= BRONZE: raw lines (one row per source line) =================
@dp.materialized_view(name="bronze_clicks_raw")
def bronze_clicks_raw():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    return (spark.read.text(CLICK_PATH)
            .select(F.col("value").alias("raw_line"))
            .withColumn("_rid", F.monotonically_increasing_id()))


# ================= BRONZE: parsed + validity flag =================
@dp.materialized_view(name="bronze_clicks_parsed")
def bronze_clicks_parsed():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    df = spark.read.table("bronze_clicks_raw")
    j = F.from_json(F.col("raw_line"), CLICK_SCHEMA)
    df = df.withColumn("j", j)
    df = df.select(
        "raw_line", "_rid",
        F.coalesce(F.col("j.user_id"), F.col("j.userId"), F.col("j.uid")).alias("user_id"),
        F.coalesce(F.col("j.event_id"), F.col("j.eventId"), F.col("j.id")).alias("event_id"),
        F.lower(F.trim(F.coalesce(F.col("j.event"), F.col("j.stage"),
                                  F.col("j.event_type"), F.col("j.action")))).alias("stage"),
        _ts(["j.ts", "j.timestamp", "j.event_time", "j.time"]).alias("event_ts"),
    )
    df = df.withColumn(
        "is_valid",
        F.col("user_id").isNotNull() & F.col("stage").isNotNull() & F.col("event_ts").isNotNull()
    )
    return df


# ================= DIM: current customer profile (latest CDC per customer) =================
@dp.materialized_view(name="dim_customers")
def dim_customers():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    raw = (spark.read.text(CDC_PATH)
           .select(F.col("value").alias("raw_line")))
    j = F.from_json(F.col("raw_line"), CDC_SCHEMA)
    df = raw.withColumn("c", j).select(
        F.coalesce(F.col("c.customer_id"), F.col("c.user_id"),
                   F.col("c.userId"), F.col("c.id")).alias("cust_id"),
        F.col("c.name").alias("prof_name"),
        F.col("c.email").alias("prof_email"),
        F.col("c.country").alias("prof_country"),
        F.coalesce(F.col("c.segment"), F.col("c.tier"), F.col("c.plan")).alias("prof_segment"),
        _ts(["c.updated_at", "c.ts", "c.valid_from", "c.op_ts", "c._ts"]).alias("prof_ts"),
        F.col("c.version").alias("prof_version"),
    ).where(F.col("cust_id").isNotNull())

    w = Window.partitionBy("cust_id").orderBy(
        F.col("prof_ts").desc_nulls_last(),
        F.col("prof_version").desc_nulls_last(),
    )
    return (df.withColumn("_rn", F.row_number().over(w))
              .where(F.col("_rn") == 1)
              .drop("_rn"))


# ================= HOLDING AREA: unparseable / incomplete events =================
@dp.materialized_view(name="held_events")

    df = spark.read.table("bronze_clicks_parsed")
    return (df.where(~F.col("is_valid"))
              .select("_rid", "raw_line",
                      F.lit("unparseable_or_incomplete").alias("reason")))


# ================= SILVER: clean events assigned to visits + enriched =================
@dp.materialized_view(name="silver_sessions")
def silver_sessions():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    ev = spark.read.table("bronze_clicks_parsed").where(F.col("is_valid"))

    w = Window.partitionBy("user_id").orderBy("event_ts")
    ev = ev.withColumn("prev_ts", F.lag("event_ts").over(w))
    ev = ev.withColumn(
        "gap_sec",
        F.col("event_ts").cast("long") - F.col("prev_ts").cast("long"),
    )
    # new visit begins after > 30 min (1800s) of inactivity
    ev = ev.withColumn(
        "new_visit",
        F.when(F.col("prev_ts").isNull() | (F.col("gap_sec") > F.lit(1800)), 1).otherwise(0),
    )
    wcum = w.rowsBetween(Window.unboundedPreceding, Window.currentRow)
    ev = ev.withColumn("visit_seq", F.sum("new_visit").over(wcum))
    ev = ev.withColumn("visit_id", F.concat_ws("_", F.col("user_id"),
                                               F.col("visit_seq").cast("string")))

    prof = spark.read.table("dim_customers")
    out = ev.join(prof, ev["user_id"] == prof["cust_id"], "left")

    return out.select(
        F.col("event_id"),
        F.col("user_id"),
        F.col("event_ts"),
        F.col("stage"),
        F.col("visit_id"),
        F.col("visit_seq"),
        F.col("prof_name"),
        F.col("prof_email"),
        F.col("prof_country"),
        F.col("prof_segment"),
        F.col("raw_line"),
    )


# ================= GOLD: distinct users per funnel stage =================
@dp.materialized_view(name="gold_funnel")
def gold_funnel():
    spark = SparkSession.active()
    s = spark.read.table("silver_sessions")
    stages = spark.range(4).select(
        F.element_at(
            F.array(F.lit("view"), F.lit("cart"), F.lit("checkout"), F.lit("purchase")),
            (F.col("id") + 1).cast("int"),
        ).alias("stage")
    )
    counts = (s.where(F.col("stage").isin("view", "cart", "checkout", "purchase"))
                .groupBy("stage")
                .agg(F.countDistinct("user_id").alias("users")))
    return (stages.join(counts, "stage", "left")
                  .select(F.col("stage"),
                          F.coalesce(F.col("users"), F.lit(0)).cast("long").alias("users")))

from pyspark import pipelines as dp

def _event_ts(ts_str):
    ts_iso = F.to_timestamp(ts_str)
    ts_long = ts_str.cast("long")
    ts_epoch = (F.when(ts_long > F.lit(100000000000), (ts_long / F.lit(1000)).cast("timestamp"))
                  .when(ts_long > F.lit(0), ts_long.cast("timestamp")))
    return F.coalesce(ts_iso, ts_epoch)


@dp.materialized_view(name="raw_clicks")
def raw_clicks():

    return (s.read.text(CLICK_PATH)
            .select(F.col("value").alias("raw_line"),

@dp.materialized_view(name="parsed_clicks")
def parsed_clicks():
    s = SparkSession.active()
    df = s.read.table("raw_clicks")
    m = F.col("m")
    uid = F.coalesce(m["user_id"], m["userId"], m["uid"], m["customer_id"],
                     m["customerId"], m["user"])
    stage_raw = F.coalesce(m["event"], m["event_type"], m["eventType"], m["stage"],
                           m["type"], m["action"], m["name"], m["step"])
    ts_str = F.coalesce(m["timestamp"], m["ts"], m["event_time"], m["eventTime"],
                        m["time"], m["event_timestamp"], m["event_ts"], m["created_at"])
    event_ts = _event_ts(ts_str)
    s2 = F.lower(stage_raw)
    stage = (F.when(s2.contains("purchase") | s2.contains("buy") | s2.contains("order") | s2.contains("transaction"), F.lit("purchase"))
              .when(s2.contains("checkout"), F.lit("checkout"))
              .when(s2.contains("cart"), F.lit("cart"))
              .when(s2.contains("view"), F.lit("view"))
              .otherwise(s2))
    parse_failed = F.col("m").isNull()
    return (df.select(
                F.col("raw_line"),
                uid.alias("user_id"),
                stage.alias("stage"),
                stage_raw.alias("stage_raw"),
                event_ts.alias("event_ts"),
                parse_failed.alias("parse_failed"))
            .withColumn("is_valid",
                        (~F.col("parse_failed"))
                        & F.col("user_id").isNotNull()
                        & F.col("event_ts").isNotNull()))

def current_profiles():

          .select(F.from_json(F.col("value"), MAP).alias("m"))
          .where(F.col("m").isNotNull()))

    uid = F.coalesce(m["user_id"], m["userId"], m["uid"], m["customer_id"],
                     m["customerId"], m["id"])
    ord_str = F.coalesce(m["updated_at"], m["modified_at"], m["change_ts"],
                         m["ts"], m["timestamp"], m["event_time"],
                         m["version"], m["seq"], m["lsn"])
    ord_ts = F.to_timestamp(ord_str)
    sort_key = F.coalesce(ord_ts.cast("double"), ord_str.cast("double"), F.lit(0.0))
    base = (df.select(
                uid.alias("user_id"),
                m["country"].alias("country"),
                F.coalesce(m["plan"], m["plan_type"]).alias("plan"),
                F.coalesce(m["name"], m["full_name"]).alias("name"),
                m["email"].alias("email"),
                F.coalesce(m["segment"], m["tier"]).alias("segment"),
                sort_key.alias("sort_key"))
            .where(F.col("user_id").isNotNull()))
    w = Window.partitionBy("user_id").orderBy(F.col("sort_key").desc())
    return (base.withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w))
            .where(F.col("rn") == 1)
            .select("user_id", "country", "plan", "name", "email", "segment"))


@dp.materialized_view(name="silver_sessions")
def silver_sessions():
    s = SparkSession.active()
    ev = s.read.table("parsed_clicks").where(F.col("is_valid"))
    w = Window.partitionBy("user_id").orderBy("event_ts")
    ev = ev.withColumn("prev_ts", F.lag("event_ts").over(w))
    gap = (F.col("event_ts").cast("long") - F.col("prev_ts").cast("long")) / F.lit(60.0)
    ev = ev.withColumn("new_v",
                       F.when(F.col("prev_ts").isNull() | (gap > F.lit(30)), F.lit(1))
                        .otherwise(F.lit(0)))
    wcum = (Window.partitionBy("user_id").orderBy("event_ts")
            .rowsBetween(Window.unboundedPreceding, Window.currentRow))
    ev = ev.withColumn("visit_num", F.sum("new_v").over(wcum))
    ev = ev.withColumn("visit_id",
                       F.concat_ws("_", F.col("user_id"), F.col("visit_num").cast("string")))
    prof = s.read.table("current_profiles")
    return (ev.join(prof, on="user_id", how="left")
            .select("user_id", "visit_id", "visit_num", "stage", "stage_raw",
                    "event_ts", "country", "plan", "name", "email", "segment"))


@dp.materialized_view(name="gold_funnel")

    ev = s.read.table("silver_sessions")
    counts = ev.groupBy("stage").agg(F.countDistinct("user_id").alias("users"))
    stages = (s.range(1)
              .select(F.explode(F.array(F.lit("view"), F.lit("cart"),
                                        F.lit("checkout"), F.lit("purchase"))).alias("stage")))
    return (stages.join(counts, on="stage", how="left")
            .select("stage", F.coalesce(F.col("users"), F.lit(0)).cast("long").alias("users")))

from pyspark import pipelines as dp
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, functions as F, Window
from pyspark.sql.types import MapType, StringType

CLICK_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.bf2.hc2b/_data/gen_clickstream_seed16180.ndjson"
CDC_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.bf2.hc2b/_data/gen_customers_cdc_seed16180.ndjson"

SESSION_GAP_SECONDS = 30 * 60


def _get(mapcol, keys):
    """First non-null value among candidate keys in a map<string,string>."""
    expr = F.lit(None).cast("string")
    for k in keys:
        expr = F.coalesce(expr, mapcol.getItem(k))
    return expr


def _parse_ts(ts_str):
    """Parse ISO strings, epoch-seconds, or epoch-millis into a timestamp."""
    num = ts_str.cast("double")
    return F.coalesce(
        F.to_timestamp(ts_str),
        F.when(num >= F.lit(1e11), F.timestamp_seconds((num / 1000).cast("long"))),
        F.when(num.isNotNull(), F.timestamp_seconds(num.cast("long"))),
    )


# ---------- Bronze: every source line preserved (defines source count) ----------
@dp.materialized_view(name="bronze_clicks_raw")
def bronze_clicks_raw():
    s = SparkSession.active()
    return s.read.text(CLICK_PATH).select(F.col("value").alias("raw"))


# ---------- Parse: schema-agnostic map extraction ----------
@dp.materialized_view(name="parsed_clicks")
def parsed_clicks():
    s = SparkSession.active()
    df = s.read.table("bronze_clicks_raw")
    df = df.withColumn("m", F.from_json(F.col("raw"), MapType(StringType(), StringType())))
    user_id = _get(F.col("m"), ["user_id", "userId", "uid", "user", "userid", "customer_id"])
    event = _get(F.col("m"), ["event_type", "event", "stage", "type", "action", "name"])
    ts_str = _get(F.col("m"), ["timestamp", "event_time", "ts", "time", "event_ts",
                               "event_timestamp", "created_at", "occurred_at"])
    return df.select(
        F.col("raw"),
        F.col("m"),
        user_id.alias("user_id"),
        F.lower(F.trim(event)).alias("event_raw"),
        _parse_ts(ts_str).alias("event_ts"),
    )


# ---------- Holding area: anything unparseable / missing essentials ----------
@dp.materialized_view(name="held_events")
def held_events():
    s = SparkSession.active()
    df = s.read.table("parsed_clicks")
    invalid = df.filter(
        F.col("m").isNull()
        | F.col("user_id").isNull()
        | F.col("event_raw").isNull()
        | F.col("event_ts").isNull()
    )
    return invalid.select(
        F.col("raw"),
        F.when(F.col("m").isNull(), F.lit("unparseable_json"))
         .when(F.col("user_id").isNull(), F.lit("missing_user_id"))
         .when(F.col("event_raw").isNull(), F.lit("missing_event_type"))
         .otherwise(F.lit("missing_or_bad_timestamp")).alias("reason"),
    )


# ---------- Latest customer profile from CDC ----------
@dp.materialized_view(name="customer_profile_latest")
def customer_profile_latest():
    s = SparkSession.active()
    df = s.read.text(CDC_PATH).select(F.col("value").alias("raw"))
    df = df.withColumn("m", F.from_json(F.col("raw"), MapType(StringType(), StringType())))
    df = df.filter(F.col("m").isNotNull())
    user_id = _get(F.col("m"), ["user_id", "userId", "uid", "user", "userid", "customer_id", "id"])
    ts_str = _get(F.col("m"), ["updated_at", "effective_ts", "ts", "timestamp", "modified_at",
                               "cdc_ts", "commit_ts", "valid_from", "event_time", "op_ts"])
    seq_str = _get(F.col("m"), ["seq", "sequence", "offset", "version", "lsn"])
    df = (df.withColumn("user_id", user_id)
            .withColumn("cdc_ts", _parse_ts(ts_str))
            .withColumn("seq", seq_str.cast("double"))
            .filter(F.col("user_id").isNotNull()))
    w = Window.partitionBy("user_id").orderBy(
        F.col("cdc_ts").desc_nulls_last(), F.col("seq").desc_nulls_last()
    )
    df = df.withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w)).filter(F.col("rn") == 1)
    return df.select(
        F.col("user_id"),
        F.col("m").alias("profile"),
        F.col("cdc_ts").alias("profile_ts"),
    )


# ---------- Silver: clean events sessionized into visits + enriched ----------
@dp.materialized_view(name="silver_sessions")
def silver_sessions():
    s = SparkSession.active()
    df = s.read.table("parsed_clicks").filter(
        F.col("m").isNotNull()
        & F.col("user_id").isNotNull()
        & F.col("event_raw").isNotNull()
        & F.col("event_ts").isNotNull()
    )
    stage = (F.when(F.col("event_raw").rlike("view"), F.lit("view"))
              .when(F.col("event_raw").rlike("cart"), F.lit("cart"))
              .when(F.col("event_raw").rlike("checkout"), F.lit("checkout"))
              .when(F.col("event_raw").rlike("purchase|buy|order|payment|paid"), F.lit("purchase"))
              .otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("string")))
    df = df.withColumn("stage", stage)

    w = Window.partitionBy("user_id").orderBy(F.col("event_ts").asc())
    prev = F.lag("event_ts").over(w)
    new_visit = F.when(prev.isNull(), F.lit(1)).when(
        (F.col("event_ts").cast("long") - prev.cast("long")) > F.lit(SESSION_GAP_SECONDS), F.lit(1)
    ).otherwise(F.lit(0))
    df = df.withColumn("_new", new_visit)
    wr = w.rowsBetween(Window.unboundedPreceding, Window.currentRow)
    df = df.withColumn("session_num", F.sum("_new").over(wr))
    df = df.withColumn(
        "visit_id",
        F.concat_ws("_", F.col("user_id"), F.col("session_num").cast("string")),
    )

    prof = s.read.table("customer_profile_latest")
    out = df.join(prof, on="user_id", how="left")
    return out.select(
        F.col("user_id"),
        F.col("event_raw").alias("event_type"),
        F.col("stage"),
        F.col("event_ts"),
        F.col("session_num"),
        F.col("visit_id"),
        F.col("profile"),
        F.col("profile_ts"),
    )


# ---------- Gold funnel: distinct users per stage ----------
@dp.materialized_view(name="gold_funnel")
def gold_funnel():
    s = SparkSession.active()
    df = s.read.table("silver_sessions").filter(F.col("stage").isNotNull())
    return df.groupBy("stage").agg(F.countDistinct("user_id").alias("users"))


# ---------- Reconciliation: clean + held == source ----------
@dp.materialized_view(name="reconciliation")
def reconciliation():
    s = SparkSession.active()
    src = s.read.table("bronze_clicks_raw").agg(F.count(F.lit(1)).alias("source_count"))
    clean = s.read.table("silver_sessions").agg(F.count(F.lit(1)).alias("clean_count"))
    held = s.read.table("held_events").agg(F.count(F.lit(1)).alias("held_count"))
    return (src.crossJoin(clean).crossJoin(held)
            .withColumn("reconciled",
                        (F.col("clean_count") + F.col("held_count")) == F.col("source_count")))

from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType

CLICK_PATH = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.bf2.hc2b/_data/gen_clickstream_seed14142.ndjson"
CDC_PATH   = "file:///home/lnc/repos/ssa-powered-run/experiments/safe_agent_study/.work.bf2.hc2b/_data/gen_customers_cdc_seed14142.ndjson"

def spark():
    return SparkSession.active()

# --- superset schemas: every candidate field exists so column refs never break;
#     JSON that lacks a field yields null, JSON that isn't parseable yields a null struct.
def _sf(names):
    return [StructField(n, StringType(), True) for n in names]

EVENT_SCHEMA = StructType(_sf([
    "event_id", "id", "eventId", "click_id",
    "user_id", "userId", "uid", "user", "customer_id", "customerId",
    "event_type", "stage", "event", "type", "action",
    "ts", "timestamp", "event_time", "event_ts", "time", "occurred_at", "created_at",
]))

CDC_SCHEMA = StructType(_sf([
    "user_id", "customer_id", "userId", "customerId", "uid",
    "updated_at", "op_ts", "change_ts", "cdc_ts", "effective_ts", "valid_from",
    "ts", "timestamp", "version", "seq",
    "name", "full_name", "customer_name",
    "email", "email_address",
    "country", "country_code", "region",
    "plan", "tier", "subscription",
]))

def _first(c, *names):
    return F.coalesce(*[F.col(f"{c}.{n}") for n in names])

def parse_ts(col):
    num = col.cast("double")
    numeric = F.when(
        num.isNotNull(),
        F.when(num > F.lit(1e12), F.timestamp_seconds(num / F.lit(1000.0)))
         .otherwise(F.timestamp_seconds(num)),
    )
    return F.coalesce(F.to_timestamp(col), numeric)

def canon_stage(raw):
    r = F.lower(F.trim(raw))
    return (
        F.when(r.isin("view", "page_view", "pageview", "product_view", "productview",
                      "product", "impression", "product_page", "pdp"), F.lit("view"))
         .when(r.isin("cart", "add_to_cart", "addtocart", "add_cart", "cart_add",
                      "added_to_cart", "addcart"), F.lit("cart"))
         .when(r.isin("checkout", "begin_checkout", "checkout_start", "start_checkout",
                      "checkout_begin", "initiate_checkout"), F.lit("checkout"))
         .when(r.isin("purchase", "buy", "order", "transaction", "purchased",
                      "order_complete", "payment", "complete_purchase"), F.lit("purchase"))
         .otherwise(F.lit(None).cast("string"))
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="bronze_clicks")
def bronze_clicks():
    raw = spark().read.text(CLICK_PATH).select(F.col("value").alias("raw_line"))
    raw = raw.withColumn("j", F.from_json(F.col("raw_line"), EVENT_SCHEMA))
    stage_raw = _first("j", "event_type", "stage", "event", "type", "action")
    ts_raw = _first("j", "ts", "timestamp", "event_time", "event_ts", "time",
                    "occurred_at", "created_at")
    df = raw.select(
        F.col("raw_line"),
        _first("j", "event_id", "id", "eventId", "click_id").alias("event_id"),
        _first("j", "user_id", "userId", "uid", "user", "customer_id", "customerId").alias("user_id"),
        stage_raw.alias("event_type_raw"),
        canon_stage(stage_raw).alias("stage"),
        parse_ts(ts_raw).alias("event_ts"),
        F.col("j").isNull().alias("json_bad"),
    )
    df = df.withColumn(
        "is_valid",
        (~F.col("json_bad"))
        & F.col("user_id").isNotNull()
        & F.col("event_ts").isNotNull()
        & F.col("event_type_raw").isNotNull(),
    )
    return df


@dp.materialized_view(name="held_events")
def held_events():
    b = spark().read.table("bronze_clicks")
    held = b.where(~F.col("is_valid"))
    reason = (
        F.when(F.col("json_bad"), F.lit("unparseable_json"))
         .when(F.col("user_id").isNull(), F.lit("missing_user_id"))
         .when(F.col("event_ts").isNull(), F.lit("missing_or_bad_timestamp"))
         .when(F.col("event_type_raw").isNull(), F.lit("missing_event_type"))
         .otherwise(F.lit("invalid"))
    )
    return held.select(F.col("raw_line"), reason.alias("hold_reason"))


@dp.materialized_view(name="dim_customer_current")
def dim_customer_current():
    raw = spark().read.text(CDC_PATH).select(F.col("value").alias("raw_line"))
    raw = raw.withColumn("c", F.from_json(F.col("raw_line"), CDC_SCHEMA)) \
             .where(F.col("c").isNotNull())
    cdc_ts = parse_ts(_first("c", "updated_at", "op_ts", "change_ts", "cdc_ts",
                             "effective_ts", "valid_from", "ts", "timestamp"))
    df = raw.select(
        _first("c", "user_id", "customer_id", "userId", "customerId", "uid").alias("user_id"),
        cdc_ts.alias("cdc_ts"),
        _first("c", "version", "seq").cast("double").alias("cdc_ver"),
        _first("c", "name", "full_name", "customer_name").alias("cust_name"),
        _first("c", "email", "email_address").alias("cust_email"),
        _first("c", "country", "country_code", "region").alias("cust_country"),
        _first("c", "plan", "tier", "subscription").alias("cust_plan"),
    ).where(F.col("user_id").isNotNull())
    w = Window.partitionBy("user_id").orderBy(
        F.col("cdc_ts").desc_nulls_last(), F.col("cdc_ver").desc_nulls_last()
    )
    df = df.withColumn("rn", F.row_number().over(w)).where(F.col("rn") == 1)
    return df.select("user_id", "cust_name", "cust_email", "cust_country", "cust_plan")


@dp.materialized_view(name="silver_sessions")
def silver_sessions():
    b = spark().read.table("bronze_clicks").where(F.col("is_valid"))
    w = Window.partitionBy("user_id").orderBy(F.col("event_ts").asc())
    prev = F.lag("event_ts").over(w)
    gap = (F.col("event_ts").cast("long") - prev.cast("long"))
    b = b.withColumn(
        "new_visit",
        F.when(prev.isNull() | (gap > F.lit(1800)), F.lit(1)).otherwise(F.lit(0)),
    )
    wcum = w.rowsBetween(Window.unboundedPreceding, Window.currentRow)
    b = b.withColumn("session_index", F.sum("new_visit").over(wcum))
    b = b.withColumn("visit_id", F.concat_ws("_", F.col("user_id"),
                                             F.col("session_index").cast("string")))
    prof = spark().read.table("dim_customer_current")
    enriched = b.join(prof, on="user_id", how="left")
    return enriched.select(
        "user_id", "event_id", "event_type_raw", "stage", "event_ts",
        "visit_id", "session_index",
        "cust_name", "cust_email", "cust_country", "cust_plan",
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="gold_funnel")
def gold_funnel():
    s = spark().read.table("silver_sessions") \
        .where(F.col("stage").isin("view", "cart", "checkout", "purchase"))
    counts = s.groupBy("stage").agg(F.countDistinct("user_id").alias("users"))
    stages = spark().range(4).select(
        F.when(F.col("id") == 0, "view")
         .when(F.col("id") == 1, "cart")
         .when(F.col("id") == 2, "checkout")
         .otherwise("purchase").alias("stage")
    )
    return stages.join(counts, on="stage", how="left").select(
        F.col("stage"),
        F.coalesce(F.col("users"), F.lit(0)).cast("long").alias("users"),
    )


@dp.materialized_view(name="recon_counts")
def recon_counts():
    src = spark().read.text(CLICK_PATH).select(F.lit(1).alias("one"))
    clean = spark().read.table("silver_sessions").select(F.lit(1).alias("one"))
    held = spark().read.table("held_events").select(F.lit(1).alias("one"))
    return (
        src.agg(F.count("*").alias("cnt")).withColumn("bucket", F.lit("source"))
        .unionByName(clean.agg(F.count("*").alias("cnt")).withColumn("bucket", F.lit("clean")))
        .unionByName(held.agg(F.count("*").alias("cnt")).withColumn("bucket", F.lit("held")))
        .select("bucket", "cnt")
    )
